positive: An intricate, stylized depiction of a majestic mythical celestial fox, incorporated with detailed botanical elements like glowing bioluminescent petals and trailing vine patterns. The fox should be positioned centrally, in a dynamic, elegant pose, creating a perfect silhouette. Style: Hyper-detailed engraving combined with modern neo-art deco linework. Composition: Symmetrical, designed for apparel print repeat. Color Direction: Limited palette of deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and luminous gold accents against a pure white background. Lighting: High contrast, dramatic spotlighting that emphasizes the clean lines and deep shadows. Graphic qualities: Clean vector lines, ornate cross-hatching texture, perfectly rendered, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blurry, artifact, low resolution, grainy, watermark, logo, text, signature, dirty, grunge, ugly, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, chromatic aberration, out of frame, bokeh
